title: peucedanum alpinum
intro: Peucedanum alpinum, also known as Alpine Parsley or Alpine Carrot, is a type of flowering plant in the parsley family (Apiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Peucedanum alpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
